description_long: This is a large, multi-story residential house surrounded by a manicured lawn and several trees. The structure features a complex layout with multiple wings, a mix of flat and gable roofs, and a combination of modern and traditional architectural elements. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with dark gray roofing and numerous large windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. There is a prominent front entryway with a covered porch and steps leading up to the main door, as well as a visible garage area. The landscaping includes evenly spaced trees and paved walkways, enhancing the suburban aesthetic. The house appears spacious, likely containing multiple rooms and amenities typical of a high-end suburban home.
description: A large, multi-story suburban house with light walls, dark gable and flat roofs, extensive windows, and landscaped surroundings. Features include a covered entryway, garage, and numerous trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an elevated angle, highlighting the roof complexity, tree placement, and the main entryway with a covered porch.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a broad, frontal perspective, emphasizing the symmetrical facade, main entrance, and the arrangement of trees along the front lawn.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the house, revealing additional windows, a secondary entrance, and more of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a clear look at the garage, driveway, and side entry, as well as the distribution of trees along the side and rear.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, prominent main door, and decorative columns
